rfps.title: RFQ-Outsourced Manpower Services (Housekeeping, MTS, Security & Drivers)
rfps.reason: This RFQ is for outsourced non-IT manpower services (housekeeping, security, drivers) — entirely outside Dhwani's software, data systems, and tech consulting scope.

rfps.title: RFP - Assessment of Market Potential and Climate-Resilient Water Supply an...
rfps.reason: This RFP is a research and evaluation study focused on market assessment and climate-resilient WSS product design for microfinance lending—it requires research/consulting expertise, not software development or data systems that Dhwani specializes in.

rfps.title: EoI - for Health Camp Community Partner to support in   Conducting Health ...
rfps.reason: This RFP is for on-ground health camp execution (mobilization, camp setup, driver screening) — a field implementation/service delivery role — not a technology or digital system development assignment.

rfps.title: RFP - Hiring multiple Agencies for Targeted Technical & Implementation Sup...
rfps.reason: RFP is vague and incomplete (cut off mid-description), lacks specific technical requirements, deliverables, and scope definition needed to assess Dhwani's fit; appears to be a blanket multi-agency hire notice rather than a defined project RFP.

rfps.title: RFP - Consultant for Digital Market Enablement, B2B & B2C Linkages for FPOs
rfps.reason: RFP seeks digital market enablement and B2B/B2C linkage platforms for FPOs—a custom software development need in Dhwani's livelihoods sector, but the core requirement is e-commerce/marketplace functionality, not grant management, data collection, or M&E systems where Dhwani has proven products.

rfps.title: RFP for the Deployment of the AgriVaani Application
rfps.reason: LEHS seeks deployment of an existing AgriVaani AI application in agriculture/livelihoods, which is outside Dhwani's core strengths (grant management, mobile data collection, training platforms), but Dhwani could support via custom integration, M&E dashboards, or data system architecture if the application needs backend MIS/monitoring capabilities.

rfps.title: RFP - For Cab Hiring Services North East Region
rfps.reason: This RFP is for cab/vehicle hiring services—a logistics and transportation procurement need with no IT, software, data, or digital transformation component.

rfps.title: RFP - On-Call Taxi Services for Raipur (Chhattisgarh) Local & Outstation T...
rfps.reason: This RFP is for on-call taxi/transportation logistics services in Raipur — a non-IT procurement that falls outside Dhwani's software, digital platforms, and tech consulting scope entirely.

rfps.title: ToR - for Hiring a Consultant/Agency to Design a Training Module and Mater...
rfps.reason: RFP is primarily for curriculum design and training content development for women's empowerment coaching — a domain expertise play rather than core IT/tech — but Dhwani could add value by bundling mLearn LMS to deliver, track, and scale the training module across community coaches.

rfps.title: RFP: Hiring of Agency for Wall Paintings
rfps.organization: MAMTA Health Institute for Mother and Child (MAMTA)

rfps.title: RFP - Cybersecurity Risk Assessment
rfps.reason: 3ie needs a specialized cybersecurity risk assessment and NIST CSF compliance audit by CISA-certified firms—a pure-play security consulting engagement outside Dhwani's ICT4D software and implementation expertise.

rfps.title: RFP - Reporting, Analytics & Business Modelling: Face-to-Face Fundraising ...
rfps.reason: RFP requires dashboard design, analytics, and business modelling for fundraising program — Dhwani's DaaS and Tech Consulting can deliver, but this is not a core social sector impact use case and lacks the grant/program lifecycle management focus where Dhwani excels.

rfps.title: RFP for Recruiting an HR Consulting Firm for Hiring Data Annotators, Revie...
rfps.reason: This RFP is for HR recruitment consulting services (hiring data annotators and MEL consultants), not for technology development, implementation, or data systems — completely outside Dhwani's core IT4D service offerings.

rfps.title: RFP - Speech Data Collection and Annotation for Public Health ASR Models
rfps.reason: RFP requires specialized AI/ML expertise in ASR (Automatic Speech Recognition) model development and speech data annotation — a niche ML engineering domain outside Dhwani's core competency in social sector MIS, data collection platforms, and grant management.

rfps.title: EOI - External Independent Audit : Protecting the Rights of Children by Bu...
rfps.reason: This RFP is exclusively for Chartered Accountant firms to conduct external financial audits of a donor-funded project—a specialized accounting/compliance service that falls outside Dhwani's IT products and tech consulting scope.

rfps.title: RFP for Agri AI Collect Deployment in Kharif 2026-2027
rfps.reason: LEHS/Wadhwani AI needs AI-powered agricultural data collection and deployment for Kharif season — Dhwani's mForm can handle mobile data collection at scale, but the 'AI' component and model deployment expertise may require partnership or subcontracting beyond Dhwani's core strengths.

rfps.title: RFP for For Multilingual Data Collection Services for AgriAI Collect
rfps.reason: RFP requires multilingual data collection services for an AI agriculture project; Dhwani's mForm platform is well-suited for field data collection, but the core deliverable (image-to-text extraction model) is AI/ML development — outside Dhwani's primary wheelhouse.

rfps.title: EOI for a study on Impact Evaluation and Value for Money Analysis of CINI’...
rfps.reason: This RFP is for academic impact evaluation and value-for-money research services, not for building or implementing technology systems — Dhwani's core strength is in software development and digital platforms, not research or evaluation consulting.

rfps.title: RFP - for Hiring of a Nukkad Natak Agency for community-based activities u...
rfps.reason: This RFP is for hiring a Nukkad Natak (street theatre) agency to conduct community-based performative advocacy activities—a creative services/entertainment outsourcing need with no IT, software, data, or digital transformation component.

rfps.title: RFP for Data Collection for Foundational Numeracy Tool in UP
rfps.reason: Large-scale handwriting data collection for an AI-powered education tool in UP requires mobile field data collection infrastructure, which mForm provides, combined with custom ML integration capabilities that Dhwani can deliver.

rfps.reason: This RFP is for a survey firm to conduct a technical needs assessment for a water program—a field research/consulting engagement, not for software development, MIS, or data platform implementation that Dhwani specializes in.

rfps.title: RFP - Assessment of WASH Access among Affordable Housing Finance Borrowers
rfps.reason: Water.org needs research/evaluation firm for WASH assessment study with data collection coordination—mForm is a strong fit for field data collection, but this is primarily a research/evaluation engagement, not a tech platform play, so positioning matters.

rfps.reason: RFP requires IVRS-based treatment literacy platform with audio modules and app delivery for health behaviour change — Dhwani has IVRS capability and mobile app expertise, but IVRS is not a core/proven product line and content development (treatment literacy) is outside Dhwani's primary scope.

rfps.reason: RFP is for baseline study consultancy (research/evaluation-focused) rather than software/platform development, but Dhwani's M&E expertise and mForm for data collection could support the quasi-experimental design if the scope includes digital data collection and analytics.

rfps.reason: This RFQ is for physical infrastructure procurement (sewerage pipe supply, installation, and biodigester commissioning), not a technology or digital system project—Dhwani's expertise is in software, data systems, and ICT4D services.
